TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == maduka ku sawada'śĹįÁėćśÄßÁĶźŤÖłÁāé maduka ku sawada' "kamu nuIng, ulcerative colitis, masaadidid' tu sulit UC" singangan tu caay ku micidekay a maduka ku sawada', u cacay manana'ay ku sawada' atu tabakiay a sawada' a maduka, u mahaymaway a imelang. masumad ku imelang u tabakiay a sawada' ku saayaway, lalid tayza i sazikuzay a sawada', saaca tiza dada' i cupenatay. angangan a adada' pasu adada' ku bili a siizang ku tai' mabanic aca, mawada' ku kabaket nu uzip, malalisan atu caay kataneng ku izang mahini hakay maduka ku sawada' anu adada'. mahiniay a imelang u mahaymaway, caay kalecad ku pihaceng, salekadlekad sa ku adada', kinatusa adada' matenes caay tu kangaay. sakahini nu manuka ku sawada' hakay tahekal ku zumaay a imelang pasu sawada' a imelang anucaay u mata, pukuh u atay a imelang, atu sigang ku sawada'. sakaput nu kitakit a acekay u UC sa u pihacengay patalaway tu uzip nu tademaw u cayay kadayum a ngaayan a imelang. UC . mihiniay madukaay ku sawada' a imelang caay kahapinang. zumaay a imelang tu kamu taneng mitena' ku nu uzipay a imelang,migingkiway tu makay winaay, cilekay nu sawada' a masumad, atu liwliw nu nikauzip. sakay macakatay a kanatal talakaw ku siimelangay tu mahiniay, zuma tahkal kunikamu, u kamu caay ku kalaliday, u Amilika a kakanan u nipicumud caay kalecad ku nikauzip. saayaway kelitan ku midepitay i muciw a sawada', hakay paliayaw tu a imelang. mahiniay tu a paketun tu nikingsaay tu sawada' patatunngus tu nikelitan a sakaput nu mauzipay. madukaay a sawada' u miladayay tu ke-lungs-cin atu buwahnguay a duka nu sawada' a imelang. masumad ku kaen a kapah tu ku imelang, mahiniay akuti'ay a kakanan nayay waneng a kakanan. pinaay a lamangan ku pingaay tu imelang, anucaay pisusud tu adada', pasu an-ci-suy-yang-swan-yen mahiniay, liw-cin-hwang-an-pi-tin,pi-ceay a ku-cun, u saicelang a sapayu mahiniay liw-cuw-pyaw atu imelang nu sawada'ay a mingaay. anu pihaceng tu, mingaay caay tu kakapah, anucaay tahkal ku zumaay mahiniay u sigangay ku tabakiay a sawada', a cici'en miketud ku sawada' hamin han micici' ku sawada tabakiay a sawada' hinien a kapah ku imelang. katukuh 2015 a mihcaan, hakay izaw ku 1100 a mang ku maliliday nu madukaay a sawada' atu ke-lung-s a imelang. paymihcaan imelangay a tademaw pay 10 amanngay pakala tu 1 katukuh 20 iza ku 5 katukuh 500 ku tademaw, ku tademaw, maliliday a tademaw pay10 amangan, mahiniay a imelang i amis a Amilika atu Ow-cow sangaleb hinza maazih ku zumaay a kakitizaan. hana imelangay sa 15 katukauh 30 ku mihcaay nu tademaw, anucaay pikakaan tu 60 ku mihcaan a tademaw. tatami tatayna malecad tu ku kalilid, makay 1950 a zidayan, mahiniay a imelang atuudkatuud satu. madukaay a sawada' atu ke-lung-s a imelang. mapulung malilid ku 100 amang ku tademaw nu Amilika. anu tatungus ku pingaay malecad tu kapahay a tademaw ku nikapatay. madula ku sawada' musakamu i 1850 a mihcaan.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == maduka ku sawada Ē~ °****** maduka ku sawada Ē~ ° "kamu nuiŇč, ur~…ĺ ¶…ôrati*…ô ¶or~…ĺitis, masaadidid Ē~ ° tu sur~…ĺit u ¶" siŇčaŇčan tu ¶aaj ku mi ¶id…ôkaj a maduka ku sawada Ē~ °, u ¶a ¶aj manana Ē~ °aj ku sawada Ē~ ° atu tabakiaj a sawada Ē~ ° a maduka, u mańßajmawaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. masumad ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u tabakiaj a sawada Ē~ ° ku saajawaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺid tajza i sazikuzaj a sawada Ē~ °, saa ¶a tiza dada Ē~ ° i ¶up…ônataj. aŇčaŇčan a adada Ē~ ° pasu adada Ē~ ° ku bir~…ĺi a siizaŇč ku tai Ē~ ° mabani ¶ a ¶a, mawada Ē~ ° ku kabak…ôt nu uzip, mar~…ĺar~…ĺisan atu ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku izaŇč mańßini ńßakaj maduka ku sawada Ē~ ° anu adada Ē~ °. mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč u mańßajmawaj, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pińßa ¶…ôŇč, sar~…ĺ…ôkadr~…ĺ…ôkad sa ku adada Ē~ °, kinatusa adada Ē~ ° mat…ôn…ôs ¶aaj tu kaŇčaaj. sakańßini nu manuka ku sawada Ē~ ° ńßakaj tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku zumaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasu sawada Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč anu ¶aaj u mata, pukuńß u ataj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, atu sigaŇč ku sawada Ē~ °. sakaput nu kitakit a a ¶…ôkaj u u ¶ sa u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj patar~…ĺawaj tu uzip nu tad…ômaw u ¶ajaj kadajum a Ňčaajan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. u ¶ . mińßiniaj madukaaj ku sawada Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč. zumaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu kamu tan…ôŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° ku nu uzipaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč,migiŇčkiwaj tu makaj winaaj, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj nu sawada Ē~ ° a masumad, atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu nikauzip. sakaj ma ¶akataj a kanatar~…ĺ tar~…ĺakaw ku siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu mańßiniaj, zuma tańßkar~…ĺ kunikamu, u kamu ¶aaj ku kar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj, u amir~…ĺika a kakanan u nipi ¶umud ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nikauzip. saajawaj k…ôr~…ĺitan ku mid…ôpitaj i mu ¶iw a sawada Ē~ °, ńßakaj par~…ĺiajaw tu a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. mańßiniaj tu a pak…ôtun tu nikiŇčsaaj tu sawada Ē~ ° patatunŇčus tu nik…ôr~…ĺitan a sakaput nu mauzipaj. madukaaj a sawada Ē~ ° u mir~…ĺadajaj tu k…ô-r~…ĺuŇčs- ¶in atu buwańßŇčuaj a duka nu sawada Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. masumad ku ka…ôn a kapańß tu ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mańßiniaj akuti Ē~ °aj a kakanan najaj wan…ôŇč a kakanan. pinaaj a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku piŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anu ¶aaj pisusud tu adada Ē~ °, pasu an- ¶i-suj-jaŇč-swan-j…ôn mańßiniaj, r~…ĺiw- ¶in-ńßwaŇč-an-pi-tin,pi- ¶…ôaj a ku- ¶un, u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a sapaju mańßiniaj r~…ĺiw- ¶uw-pjaw atu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu sawada Ē~ °aj a miŇčaaj. anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu, miŇčaaj ¶aaj tu kakapańß, anu ¶aaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku zumaaj mańßiniaj u sigaŇčaj ku tabakiaj a sawada Ē~ °, a ¶i ¶i Ē~ °…ôn mik…ôtud ku sawada Ē~ ° ńßamin ńßan mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° ku sawada tabakiaj a sawada Ē~ ° ńßini…ôn a kapańß ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ńßakaj izaw ku **** a maŇč ku mar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu madukaaj a sawada Ē~ ° atu k…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-s a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. pajmińß ¶aan im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw paj ** amanŇčaj pakar~…ĺa tu * katukuńß ** iza ku * katukuńß *** ku tad…ômaw, ku tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw paj** amaŇčan, mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč i amis a amir~…ĺika atu ow- ¶ow saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ńßinza maazińß ku zumaaj a kakitizaan. ńßana im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj sa ** katukauńß ** ku mińß ¶aaj nu tad…ômaw, anu ¶aaj pikakaan tu ** ku mińß ¶aan a tad…ômaw. tatami tatajna mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid, makaj **** a zidajan, mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atuudkatuud satu. madukaaj a sawada Ē~ ° atu k…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-s a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. mapur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku *** amaŇč ku tad…ômaw nu amir~…ĺika. anu tatuŇčus ku piŇčaaj mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kapańßaj a tad…ômaw ku nikapataj. madur~…ĺa ku sawada Ē~ ° musakamu i **** a mińß ¶aan.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == maduka ku sawada'śĹįÁėćśÄßÁĶźŤÖłÁāé maduka ku sawada' "kamu nuIng, ulcerative colitis, masaadidid' tu sulit UC" singangan tu caay ku micidekay a maduka ku sawada', u cacay manana'ay ku sawada' atu tabakiay a sawada' a maduka, u mahaymaway a imelang. masumad ku imelang u tabakiay a sawada' ku saayaway, lalid tayza i sazikuzay a sawada', saaca tiza dada' i cupenatay. angangan a adada' pasu adada' ku bili a siizang ku tai' mabanic aca, mawada' ku kabaket nu uzip, malalisan atu caay kataneng ku izang mahini hakay maduka ku sawada' anu adada'. mahiniay a imelang u mahaymaway, caay kalecad ku pihaceng, salekadlekad sa ku adada', kinatusa adada' matenes caay tu kangaay. sakahini nu manuka ku sawada' hakay tahekal ku zumaay a imelang pasu sawada' a imelang anucaay u mata, pukuh u atay a imelang, atu sigang ku sawada'. sakaput nu kitakit a acekay u UC sa u pihacengay patalaway tu uzip nu tademaw u cayay kadayum a ngaayan a imelang. UC . mihiniay madukaay ku sawada' a imelang caay kahapinang. zumaay a imelang tu kamu taneng mitena' ku nu uzipay a imelang,migingkiway tu makay winaay, cilekay nu sawada' a masumad, atu liwliw nu nikauzip. sakay macakatay a kanatal talakaw ku siimelangay tu mahiniay, zuma tahkal kunikamu, u kamu caay ku kalaliday, u Amilika a kakanan u nipicumud caay kalecad ku nikauzip. saayaway kelitan ku midepitay i muciw a sawada', hakay paliayaw tu a imelang. mahiniay tu a paketun tu nikingsaay tu sawada' patatunngus tu nikelitan a sakaput nu mauzipay. madukaay a sawada' u miladayay tu ke-lungs-cin atu buwahnguay a duka nu sawada' a imelang. masumad ku kaen a kapah tu ku imelang, mahiniay akuti'ay a kakanan nayay waneng a kakanan. pinaay a lamangan ku pingaay tu imelang, anucaay pisusud tu adada', pasu an-ci-suy-yang-swan-yen mahiniay, liw-cin-hwang-an-pi-tin,pi-ceay a ku-cun, u saicelang a sapayu mahiniay liw-cuw-pyaw atu imelang nu sawada'ay a mingaay. anu pihaceng tu, mingaay caay tu kakapah, anucaay tahkal ku zumaay mahiniay u sigangay ku tabakiay a sawada', a cici'en miketud ku sawada' hamin han micici' ku sawada tabakiay a sawada' hinien a kapah ku imelang. katukuh 2015 a mihcaan, hakay izaw ku 1100 a mang ku maliliday nu madukaay a sawada' atu ke-lung-s a imelang. paymihcaan imelangay a tademaw pay 10 amanngay pakala tu 1 katukuh 20 iza ku 5 katukuh 500 ku tademaw, ku tademaw, maliliday a tademaw pay10 amangan, mahiniay a imelang i amis a Amilika atu Ow-cow sangaleb hinza maazih ku zumaay a kakitizaan. hana imelangay sa 15 katukauh 30 ku mihcaay nu tademaw, anucaay pikakaan tu 60 ku mihcaan a tademaw. tatami tatayna malecad tu ku kalilid, makay 1950 a zidayan, mahiniay a imelang atuudkatuud satu. madukaay a sawada' atu ke-lung-s a imelang. mapulung malilid ku 100 amang ku tademaw nu Amilika. anu tatungus ku pingaay malecad tu kapahay a tademaw ku nikapatay. madula ku sawada' musakamu i 1850 a mihcaan.

im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč. zumaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu kamu tan…ôŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° ku nu uzipaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč,migiŇčkiwaj tu makaj winaaj, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj nu sawada Ē~ ° a masumad, atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu nikauzip. sakaj ma ¶akataj a kanatar~…ĺ tar~…ĺakaw ku siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu mańßiniaj, zuma tańßkar~…ĺ kunikamu, u kamu ¶aaj ku kar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj, u amir~…ĺika a kakanan u nipi ¶umud ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nikauzip. saajawaj k…ôr~…ĺitan ku mid…ôpitaj i mu ¶iw a sawada Ē~ °, ńßakaj par~…ĺiajaw tu a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. mańßiniaj tu a pak…ôtun tu nikiŇčsaaj tu sawada Ē~ ° patatunŇčus tu nik…ôr~…ĺitan a sakaput nu mauzipaj. madukaaj a sawada Ē~ ° u mir~…ĺadajaj tu k…ô-r~…ĺuŇčs- ¶in atu buwańßŇčuaj a duka nu sawada Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. masumad ku ka…ôn a kapańß tu ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mańßiniaj akuti Ē~ °aj a kakanan najaj wan…ôŇč a kakanan. pinaaj a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku piŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anu ¶aaj pisusud tu adada Ē~ °, pasu an- ¶i-suj-jaŇč-swan-j…ôn mańßiniaj, r~…ĺiw- ¶in-ńßwaŇč-an-pi-tin,pi- ¶…ôaj a ku- ¶un, u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a sapaju mańßiniaj r~…ĺiw- ¶uw-pjaw atu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu sawada Ē~ °aj a miŇčaaj. anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu, miŇčaaj ¶aaj tu kakapańß, anu ¶aaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku zumaaj mańßiniaj u sigaŇčaj ku tabakiaj a sawada Ē~ °, a ¶i ¶i Ē~ °…ôn mik…ôtud ku sawada Ē~ ° ńßamin ńßan mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° ku sawada tabakiaj a sawada Ē~ ° ńßini…ôn a kapańß ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ńßakaj izaw ku **** a maŇč ku mar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu madukaaj a sawada Ē~ ° atu k…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-s a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. pajmińß ¶aan im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw paj ** amanŇčaj pakar~…ĺa tu * katukuńß ** iza ku * katukuńß *** ku tad…ômaw, ku tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw paj** amaŇčan, mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč i amis a amir~…ĺika atu ow- ¶ow saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ńßinza maazińß ku zumaaj a kakitizaan. ńßana im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj sa ** katukauńß ** ku mińß ¶aaj nu tad…ômaw, anu ¶aaj pikakaan tu ** ku mińß ¶aan a tad…ômaw. tatami tatajna mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid, makaj **** a zidajan, mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atuudkatuud satu. madukaaj a sawada Ē~ ° atu k…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-s a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. mapur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku *** amaŇč ku tad…ômaw nu amir~…ĺika. anu tatuŇčus ku piŇčaaj mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kapańßaj a tad…ômaw ku nikapataj. madur~…ĺa ku sawada Ē~ ° musakamu i **** a mińß ¶aan.
